title: fix: remove invalid Vertex AI imageSize, expand image test coverage
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fixing the banana stand
gist.blurb: We've squashed those pesky 400 errors when generating 512x512 images with our nanobanana models. We also added a ton of new tests to keep the image pipeline rock solid.
gist.summary: Resolved Vertex AI 400 errors for nanobanana models by removing the unsupported 0.5K image size tier and expanded integration test coverage.
gist.impact: Users will no longer experience errors when requesting smaller images from nanobanana models, ensuring smoother generation.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee fixing a giant pixelated banana (representing the nanobanana model) on a workbench, symbolizing the bug fix for the nanobanana image models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, using a silver wrench to fix a glowing pixelated banana on a wooden workbench. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
